revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-4-090

Alternative term: Tidal wave (USA)

Predictable variation in the height of the sea level due to the effects of the moon, and to a lesser extent the sun, influenced by the rotation of the earth.


Note: A rising tide is called a flood tide and a falling tide an ebb tide.

{{IALAFooter}}
